title: At least one
prompt: Write either_true(a, b) — both are True/False — returning True if AT LEAST ONE of them is True.

help.plain: Return True when one or both inputs are True; only False when both are False.
help.analogy: Two doors into a room — you get in if EITHER one is unlocked.
help.nudge: Which keyword means 'at least one of these is true'?
